assertions.reason: Direct navigation to /admin showed a password form, an incorrect password produced the localized incorrect-password error, and the configured ADMIN_PASSWORD from the local .env unlocked the admin dashboard.
evidence: Visible text after the wrong-password submit included: "Incorrect password. Please try again."
Visible text after the successful submit included: "Admin Dashboard", "Source Health", and the source catalog table.

assertions.reason: The sidebar/navigation only exposed Map, Entities, and Trends; there was no Admin link before navigating directly to /admin.
evidence: Annotated home screenshot refs showed only the Map, Entities, and Trends links in the sidebar nav.
